entries.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
entries.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

entries.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
entries.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

entries.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
entries.description: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

entries.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
entries.description: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appeara

entries.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
entries.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

entries.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
entries.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

entries.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
entries.description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

entries.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
entries.description: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational  shopping experience for users.

entries.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
entries.description: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.

entries.title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors
entries.description: ElevenLabs reveals new investors, hits $500M ARR, and expands enterprise footprint as voice AI becomes a critical interface.

entries.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
entries.description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

entries.title: 4 days left: Get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass to make more deals faster

entries.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
entries.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.
